message:
Add system prompt resolver with layered override support

Implements ResolveSystemPrompt with 4-layer resolution:
1. CLI flag (--system-prompt) - explicit file path
2. Project .serf/prompts/ - per-project overrides
3. Global ~/.config/serf/prompts/ - user-wide overrides
4. Embedded defaults (go:embed) - compiled into binary

Within each directory source, tries most-specific name first:
system.<provider>.<model>.md -> system.<provider>.md -> system.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
